---
title: "Anne Marie Green"
subtitle: "Ph.D. Student, UC Berkeley"
image: media/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 18em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:annemarie_green@berkeley.edu
    - text: Twitter
      icon: twitter
      href: https://x.com/amgreentweets
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anne-marie-green-8883b9157/
---

<!-- Bio text is shared with the About page. Edit _bio.qmd to change both at once. -->
{{< include _bio.qmd >}}
